includena-help:
Image records may have data fields not available and assigned a value of "N/A".
   • When selected, any image with an "N/A" value in any data field will be included in the search results. By default, the N/A box is checked.
   • For example, if you are searching for a MALE subject, images with a Gender value of "N/A" will be included in your search results.
   • If the N/A box is NOT checked, all records with a Gender value of "N/A" will be excluded from the search.
   • It is advised to select the N/A box unless you want to limit your search results with fields only with valid data.
file-format-2: All images that needed to Search Face are contained in one folder and must be zipped into a single file using type of format is zip( *.zip). Customer can use any application have feature compress and un compress files with ".zip" format to make ".zip" files. Ex: WinZip, WinRar,...
title: Toplu Arama Çıktısı
ms-transfer: FaceSearch yüklenen fotoğrafları analiz eder. Yükleme durumunu Toplu Arama Görüntüle seçeneğinden görebilirsiniz.
ms-format-vaild:
Dosya tipi geçersiz.
*.zip uzantılı doya yükleyiniz.
file-format-1: Fotoğraflar şu formatlarda olmalıdır : jpg, jpeg, bmp, png.
explain: Kullanım Rehberi butonuna basarak Toplu Arama Çıktısını indiriniz
